ai.notes: The form uses Lever's standard application structure. The 'Current location' field is a dynamic search input. The AI tools question is a checkbox group.

fields.question: Which location are you applying for?
How soon are you available to start a new role?
What is your current work authorization status for the country where you plan to be primarily based? Please specify the type of document/visa and its validity
Please select the level that most accurately describes your professional English communication skills (written and verbal)
options: C2 / Native or Bilingual (Total fluency, can lead complex strategic discussions with ease)
C1 / Advanced (Professional fluency, can handle ambiguity and technical jargon)
B2 / Upper Intermediate (Effective operational proficiency, can lead squad-level tasks)
A1 - A2 / Beginner or Elementary (Basic greetings/short phrases)

fields.question: Do you have at least 5 years of commercial experience as a PostgreSQL DBA in high-load production environments?
Have you professionally designed and implemented High Availability (HA) architectures for PostgreSQL using tools like Patroni or Stolon?
options: Yes, I have implemented and maintained these
I have managed existing HA setups, but not designed them
No, I only have experience with single-instance or basic replica setups

fields.question: On-Call/Reliability: Are you comfortable acting as the "ultimate reliability owner," including participation in an on-call rotation for mission-critical banking systems?
Have you been the primary owner of Backup & Restore strategies including regular automated validation and Disaster Recovery (DR) drills?
Do you have professional experience managing PostgreSQL within a Google Cloud Platform (GCP) environment using Terraform?
options: Yes, but using a different cloud (AWS/Azure) or manual setup

fields.question: Fintech/Regulation: Have you worked in a regulated environment (e.g., PCI DSS, GDPR, or Banking) where audit trails and strict access controls were mandatory?
Do you actively use AI-powered tools (Cursor, Copilot, ChatGPT/Claude) to assist in query optimization, script writing, or architectural planning?
What are your salary expectations per annum (EUR Gross)?
